options.text: The validated object, or it throws an exception on failure
options.feedback: Wrong: safeParse does not throw by default; it reports failure in the result.

options.text: A Promise that resolves to the parsed environment object

whyOptions.text: It allows handling invalid env values without exceptions interrupting startup flow.
